scripts.dev: npm run build:mobile-web && npm run dev:electron
scripts.build:all: npm run build:electron && npm run build:backend && npm run build:tui
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck && npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:tui && npm run typecheck:mobile-web
scripts.dist: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:cli-runtime && npm run prepare:mobile-web && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:backend && export CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:cli-runtime -- --target darwin-arm64 && npm run prepare:mobile-web && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml --mac --dir && bash apps/electron/scripts/fix-mac-signatures.sh && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml --mac --prepackaged dist/mac-arm64
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:cli-runtime -- --target windows-x64 && npm run prepare:mobile-web && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml --win --x64
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:cli-runtime -- --target linux-x64 && npm run prepare:mobile-web && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml --linux --x64
scripts.dist:linux-arm64: npm run build:backend && npm run build:electron && npm run prepare:cli-runtime -- --target linux-arm64 && npm run prepare:mobile-web && electron-builder --config apps/electron/electron-builder.yml --linux --arm64
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:node && npm run typecheck:web
scripts.test:layout-ui-extreme: tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/layout/layout.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/lib/filesystemDragDrop.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/lib/windowing.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/lib/menuPlacement.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/stores/layoutStore.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/stores/appStore.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/stores/fileEditorStore.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Layout/panelKindUiRegistry.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Layout/panelHeaderPresentation.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Layout/tabDropTargets.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Layout/compactPanelTabMeasure.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/runtimeRetention.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/terminalDimensions.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/runtimeOwnership.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/terminalRecovery.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/terminalTabIcons.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Terminal/terminalWindowsPty.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Monitor/monitorPresentation.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/ui/src/renderer_v2/components/Monitor/monitorData.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/electron/src/main/monitorWindowRegistry.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/electron/src/main/terminalRecovery.extreme.spec.ts
scripts.test:backend-unit-extreme: tsx packages/backend/src/services/fileSystemService.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/backend/src/services/Gateway/webSocketGatewayControlService.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/backend/src/services/terminal/terminalPersistence.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/backend/src/services/ssh/SftpAdaptiveTransferTuner.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/backend/src/services/sshBackend.extreme.spec.ts && tsx packages/backend/src/services/resourceMonitorService.extreme.spec.ts
